title: Resurrection Run Telemetry v1
description: Tier-1 telemetry schema for logging individual resurrection attempts across engines.

version.description: Schema version for this telemetry record.

recordedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this resurrection attempt was recorded.

runId.description: Unique identifier for this resurrection run within the telemetry system.

sessionId.description: Identifier for the player or simulation session.

playerId.description: Opaque, pseudonymous player identifier when applicable.

identity.description: Identity fields for linking this run to seeds, events, and origins.

seedId.description: ID of the resurrection seed, if the run is seed-scoped.

eventId.description: ID of the resurrection event, if the run is event-scoped.

originId.description: Opaque identifier for the originating design or contract (e.g., bundle, archetype).

context.description: Runtime context where the resurrection was attempted.

regionId.description: Region ID where the resurrection manifested.

timePhase.description: High-level time or session phase (e.g., early, mid, late, echo).

stage.description: Author-defined stage name within the resurrection script.

resurrectionKind.description: Kind of resurrection attempt (e.g., echo, replay, escalation, soft-visit).

invariants.description: Snapshot of key invariants at the moment of the resurrection run.

metricsBefore.description: Entertainment metrics immediately before the resurrection attempt.

metricsAfter.description: Entertainment metrics shortly after the resurrection attempt.

gate.description: Resurrection gate decision and contributing factors.

allowed.description: Whether this resurrection attempt was allowed to manifest.

distance.description: Normalized distance between ancestor and candidate profiles, 0–1 recommended.

noveltyThreshold.description: Configured novelty threshold for allowing this resurrection, 0–1 recommended.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason code or short description for the gate decision.

localScore.description: Per-run resurrection quality score and its components.

outcome.description: Observed player or agent outcome for this resurrection run.

playerOutcome.description: Coarse classification (e.g., flee, observe, ignore, engage, unknown).

exposureSeconds.description: Approximate exposure duration in seconds attributable to this resurrection run.

physio.description: Optional physiology summary, using coarse buckets only.

engine.description: Optional engine-specific metadata to assist adapters.

buildId.description: Opaque identifier for the build or experiment configuration.

extras.description: Optional extension point for lab-tier fields. Tier-1 consumers must ignore.
